similar words of the question link to columns:
the youngest living president -> president, age at start date

The question is asking to determine who was the youngest living president based on the given data. To find out, we need to sort the data based on the "age at start date" column in the order of "small to large" using the f_sort_column(age at start date) operation. This will allow us to see the president with the youngest age at start date, as well as the order of presidents from youngest to oldest.
The youngest living president was Theodore Roosevelt, who was 49 years, 241 days old at the start of his presidency.
